query: Anything important about Walmart Connect this week?
executive_summary: Walmart Connect made significant moves this week, expanding its self-serve advertising platform and announcing new DSP API partnerships. These changes position Walmart Connect as a stronger competitor in the retail media space.

key_signals.signal: Walmart Connect reduced minimum self-serve spend threshold from $50K to $5K/month, targeting mid-market brands.
key_signals.source_title: Walmart Connect Lowers Barrier to Entry with Self-Serve Expansion

key_signals.signal: Walmart Connect signed API partnerships with three major DSPs for programmatic access to first-party shopper data.
key_signals.source_title: Walmart Connect Opens API to Programmatic Buyers

risks.description: Walmart Connect's self-serve expansion directly threatens mid-market advertiser retention with the $5K-$50K/month spend tier.

opportunities.description: Walmart Connect's DSP API program creates a standard for retail media APIs — accelerating our own program could capture remaining DSP partnerships.

action_items.action: Conduct competitive pricing analysis against Walmart Connect's new self-serve tiers and propose pricing adjustments by EOW.
action_items.rationale: The $5K minimum directly undercuts our entry tier. Risk of mid-market churn is immediate.

action_items.action: Schedule DSP partnership review to accelerate our API program.
action_items.rationale: First-mover advantage with remaining DSPs before Walmart Connect locks them in.

sources.title: Walmart Connect Lowers Barrier to Entry with Self-Serve Expansion
sources.snippet: Walmart Connect announced today that it is reducing the minimum monthly spend for its self-serve advertising platform from $50,000 to $5,000.

sources.title: Walmart Connect Opens API to Programmatic Buyers
sources.snippet: Three major demand-side platforms have signed API partnership agreements with Walmart Connect.

tool_trace.output_summary: Returned 3 articles. Top result: self-serve expansion announcement.
Returned 3 articles. Found DSP partnership announcement.
